title: Voronoi Tapestry
description: Interactive Voronoi diagram builder with Delaunay triangulation, Lloyd relaxation, and 5 color palettes.
concept: Place points on a canvas and watch the plane partition into Voronoi cells — each region contains all points closer to its seed than to any other. Switch to Delaunay to see the dual graph. Hit Relax to run Lloyd's algorithm and watch cells drift into perfect equilibrium. Five color palettes transform the same geometry into cosmic nebulae, forest biomes, ocean depths, volcanic fire, or sleek monochrome.
features: Click to place seeds, drag to move, right-click to delete (up to 60 cells)
Three render modes: Voronoi cells, Delaunay triangulation, Both overlaid
Five color palettes: Cosmic, Biome, Ocean, Fire, Mono
Export PNG · localStorage persistence · Keyboard shortcuts R/C/L/E/1/2/3

interaction.click: Place new Voronoi seed; drag existing seeds to reposition
interaction.touch: Tap to add, drag to move seeds
interaction.keyboard: R=random, C=clear, L=toggle relax, E=export, 1/2/3=view modes
